description.value:
A fragment of the Green Heart's root-network, crystallized with Kaelen's warmth-light during her transformation. The shard is warm to the touch, humming very slightly — a subsonic resonance. The surface is polished by age and attention. Inside, faint golden light moves like slow flame.

"The root remembers everything it has touched. She has touched us before. Now you carry a piece of that memory."
description.gm:
PROPERTIES WHILE CARRIED:

  • Heart-Tracking: The carrier knows the direction of the Green Heart at all times, within 100 miles.
  • Kaelen-Sense: The carrier can sense whether Kaelen's flame is strong or weakening (grants rough status: "burning bright," "dimming," "near extinguished").

SPECIAL USE: GRAFVITNIR STAGE 3 (Beat 26)

During Stage 3 of the Grafvitnir encounter, a hero can hold the Root-Shard aloft and activate its power (Action):

  • The 4-round counter for the Grafvitnir encounter is advanced by 1 round.
  • This represents Kaelen's awareness of their need and the Green Heart's answering resonance.
  • One use total. After use, the shard cracks audibly and goes cold. It is no longer magical.

DIRECTOR NOTES: This item is both mechanical and emotional. The final use in Stage 3 should feel like calling out to something loved and distant. The crack when it breaks should be heard at the table. The shard will grow warm during the siege — reminding the carrier: She is here. She is holding. You are not alone.
